rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is wholly unrelated to Educ. Code §38.0101, which governs school district authority to employ nonphysician mental health professionals. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A school district may employ or contract with one or more nonphysician mental health professionals.
_note: Rule text pertains to an entirely different subject matter; no conflict possible.
